fr:title.text: On models of higher-order separation logic

fr:frontmatter.fr:title: On models of higher-order separation logic
fr:frontmatter.fr:meta: @article{bizjak-birkedal-2018, author = {Bizjak, Ale\v{s} and Birkedal, Lars}, year = {2018}, doi = {10.1016/j.entcs.2018.03.016}, journal = {Electronic Notes in Theoretical Computer Science}, pages = {57--78}, title = {On Models of Higher-Order Separation Logic}, volume = {336}, }
